name: ENEM Content Creator - Local Ollama (REAL)
description: Generates 500+ ENEM questions using Qwen 32B (Local) - REAL execution

body.prompt: You are an ENEM expert. Generate ONLY valid JSON (no markdown) with 50 ENEM-style multiple choice questions for testing. Format: {"metadata": {"total_questions": 50, "categories": 5}, "questions": [{"id": "Q001", "category": "português", "difficulty": "easy", "text": "Question text here...", "options": [{"letter": "A", "text": "Option A"}, {"letter": "B", "text": "Option B"}, {"letter": "C", "text": "Option C"}, {"letter": "D", "text": "Option D"}, {"letter": "E", "text": "Option E"}], "correct_answer": "C", "explanation": "Why C is correct...", "tips": ["Tip 1", "Tip 2"]}]}. NO markdown. Start immediately with JSON.
